subcodes.first_line: The Ancient Banner hath been raised upon the Mount of the world. Blessed is he who hasteneth unto it with his heart. They that remain heedless this day are indeed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نصب علم القدم علی طور العالم طوبی لمن سرع الیه بالقلوب ان الذین غفلوا الیوم اولئک
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @call to action, @Greatest Name, @chastisement and requital, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
